specs.title: cp-000: Search PubMedscholarly database full-text search
cp-001: Library browse papers already in users library
cp-002: DOI paste a DOI to resolve and preview
cp-003: Manual manual citation entry form
cp-004: Multi-select can select multiple references at once
cp-005: Selected count displayed
cp-006: Keyboard navigation arrow keys Enter
cp-007: Escape to close
cp-008: Insert button adds citation nodes to editor at cursor position
cp-009: Appears as a chipbadge in the text eg 1 or 123
cp-010: Citation numbering follows document order Vancouver numeric style
cp-011: Citation numbers update automatically when citations are reordered
cp-012: Cursor position is saved before dialog opens
cp-013: After inserting editor refocuses at saved position
cp-014: Citation notice appears briefly Citation inserted or N citations inserted 25s au
cp-015: Bibliography node is auto-inserted at document end if not already present
cp-016: Opens via CmdShiftR keyboard shortcut
cp-017: Opens via TopBar reference badge button Editor page
cp-018: Opens via View all N references link Studio left sidebar
cp-019: Cited vs uncited references separated into groups Not cited label for uncited
cp-020: Sort modes by number author year date added
cp-021: Filtersearch by title author journal Filter references input
cp-022: Reference count displayed in header
cp-023: Add reference button opens citation dialog
cp-024: Delete reference with confirmation
cp-025: DOI copy copy DOI to clipboard
cp-026: Expandcollapse click to see full reference details
cp-027: Close button closes the sidebar
cp-028: BibliographyNode auto-inserted at document end when first citation is added
cp-029: Renders formatted reference list from the reference store
cp-030: Only one bibliography block allowed per document prevents duplicates
